The 'False Nine' wasn't invented by Pep Guardiola, folks!

Rewind to the mid-2000s. Luciano Spalletti at Roma, unleashing a masterclass with Francesco Totti. Not a striker, not a midfielder – but that fluid #10 dropping deep, dragging defenders out of position, and creating chaos. Pure tactical genius that changed how Europe saw attacking football. Underrated history! #Tactics #SerieA #FootballHistory

They don't make them like this anymore! 🦁 George Weah in the 90s was a DIFFERENT breed. Solo goals, raw power, and the ONLY African player EVER to win the Ballon d'Or (1995)! Forget your modern forwards, Weah was an UNSTOPPABLE force for PSG & Milan. Pure LEGEND status earned.

Who's REALLY the king of European glory? 🏆 Samuel Eto'o, that's who! The ONLY player to win back-to-back continental Trebles with different clubs (Barça '09 & Inter '10). His goal output and big-game impact in those eras? Simply monstrous. Unstoppable legend! #AfricanLegends #FootballFacts #HistoryMakers

Mourinho's Chelsea: Unstoppable force or chequebook dominance?

When the Special One arrived in 2004, Chelsea went beast mode. Back-to-back Prem titles, record points, rock-solid defence. Was it pure tactical masterclass and winning mentality, or simply outspending everyone? A mix, sure, but that team was built different. #ChelseaFC #Mourinho #PremierLeague
